tasks.text: Unblock **Bata IN store locator / ProManage cutover**: redirect legacy SFCC locator to stores.bata.com; verify ProManage static store URLs on PDP Find in Store

Review **MULE order-not-shipped statuses**: analyse which statuses mean the order has not shipped yet

Unblock **BATA ID shipment emails**: fix incomplete address on order placed/shipment template
Finish **BATA CO shipment email**: update customer service contact info on order shipment template
Finish **AW order-ready & ISS emails**: remove Order Ready disclaimer (IT/ES); update in-store pickup messaging and confirmation email
Finish **newsletter subscribe on Bata DEV sites**: fix stuck "troubles subscribing your details" message (BG, HU, LV, SE, EE, RO, LT)
Unblock **registration journey OpenSearch monitors**: customer registration degraded alerts for Aftersales

Finish **AW transactional email content** (IT/EN/ES): remove recurring wrong/old content from templates
